title: strLength assertion on join and concat
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a (name String, age Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
CREATE TABLE b (id Int32, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO a (name, age) VALUES ('Alice', 30), ('Bob', NULL), (NULL, 25);
SELECT a.name, concat('{ "user":"', a.name, '", "age":', if(isNull(a.age), 'NULL', toString(a.age)), ' }') as json FROM a JOIN b ON a.age = b.id;
key_bug_features: strLength assertion on join and concat
